class Solution {
public:
    string removeOccurrences(string s, string part) {
        string stack;
        int n = s.length();
        int m = part.length();
        for (char c : s) {
            stack.push_back(c);
            while (stack.size() >= m && stack.substr(stack.size() - m) == part) {
                stack.erase(stack.size() - m);
            }
        }
        return stack;
    }
};

class Solution {
public:
    string removeOccurrences(string s, string part) {
        string stack;

solution: 
```cpp
class Solution {
public:
    string removeOccurrences(string s, string part) {
        string stack;
        int m = part.size();
        for (char c : s) {
            stack.push_back(c);
            while (stack.size() >= m && stack.substr(stack.size() - m) == part) {
                stack.erase(stack.size() - m, m);
            }
        }
        return stack;
    }
};
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n * m)
space complexity: O(n)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: Uses a stack-like string to build the result while checking for the target substring after each character addition. Removes the substring immediately when found, ensuring leftmost removals first. Efficient for given constraints.
